name: Cumulus
description: Fair-weather clouds drifting across a flat blue sky, the occasional sun breaking through — every redraw re-billows the puffs.

code.style: --puffy: @rand(-8%, 12%); --rule: ( /* the cloud is one slab plus two shadow puffs in a shared white */ --cw: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color3)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(8%, 26%); top: @rand(34%, 56%); width: @rand(52%, 68%); height: 24%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--cw); box-shadow: calc(150px / @Y) calc(-120px / @Y) 0 calc(20px / @Y) @var(--cw), calc(-40px / @Y) calc(-100px / @Y) @var(--cw); transition: ease 800ms; } } @random(0.14) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(22%, 34%); left: 62%; top: var(--puffy); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color2); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
